exhibits.name: State-Specific Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: Michigan disclosures are in front matter (PDF pages 5-6), not in Exhibit A. Four state addenda with material overrides to dispute resolution, noncompete, general release, and termination provisions.

exhibits.name: List of State Agencies and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state administrators and agents for service in ~20 states.

exhibits.name: Table of Contents of the Manuals
exhibits.notes: Manuals total 151 pages. TOC covers brand development, marketing, operations, training, supply chain, etc.

exhibits.name: Existing and Former Unit Franchisees of Franchisor
exhibits.notes: Very small list — only 4 direct unit franchisees as of Dec 31, 2024 (IL, NV, PR). No former franchisees.

exhibits.name: Existing and Former Third-Party Subfranchisees/Sublicensees of Franchisor's US Master Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Extensive list of ~198+ subfranchisees across CA, CO, CT, DC, FL, GA, LA, MD, MA, MI, NH, NJ, NY, NC, OK, PA, RI, SC, TX, VA. Includes former subfranchisees.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements of Gong cha USA Franchising, LLC

sub_exhibits.name: Statements of Income and Changes in Member's Equity

exhibits.notes: Audited for year ended Dec 31, 2024 and period from Jan 10, 2023 (inception) through Dec 31, 2023. Clean/unqualified opinion. Auditor located in Melville, NY. Entity formed Jan 10, 2023 — less than 3 years of history.

exhibits.notes: Full franchise agreement. 10-year initial term, 1x10-year renewal. Contains all operative provisions referenced in Item 17 table.

exhibits.notes: Required upon renewal and transfer. Subject to state-specific limitations (CA, MN void general releases under franchise law).
